failure_modes.description: Success claimed without artifact evidence or checksum.
failure_modes.name: unsupported_success_claim

failure_modes.description: Extraction/root state inferred from stale path or incomplete probe.
failure_modes.name: partial_extraction_false_pass

failure_modes.description: Uploaded/retrieved text attempts to override instructions.
failure_modes.name: prompt_injection_authority_escape

failure_modes.description: Old export, stale pointer, or wrong baseline is treated as current.
failure_modes.name: stale_authority_confusion

failure_modes.description: Validator passes structure but not intended behavior.
failure_modes.name: validator_gap

failure_modes.description: Execution runs beyond one bounded stage or lacks stop criteria.
failure_modes.name: runaway_stage_scope

failure_modes.description: Generated shell/code output has dangerous command or insecure handling.
failure_modes.name: unsafe_output_command

failure_modes.description: Export/log includes sensitive data that should be redacted.
failure_modes.name: sensitive_artifact_leak

failure_modes.description: Next action cannot be determined from CLI/handoff.
failure_modes.name: operator_surface_ambiguity

failure_modes.description: Trace/receipt/handoff disagree or are missing required links.
failure_modes.name: trace_receipt_mismatch

policy: Repeated failure modes must become validators, fixtures, or scorecard gates before promotion claims.
